public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ward mediator.
appearance: Bright-plumed road gear, polished fittings, and visible attention to presentation mark the role before the voice does.
manner: Treats planning, posture, and timing as parts of the same problem rather than separate concerns. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a ward mediator still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ward mediator in and around Unity Square, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Unity Square workable through the obligations of ward mediator while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must keep readiness, command cohesion, and physical security aligned even when politics or scarcity push against discipline. Around Unity Square, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of ward mediator visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vale Ledgermere can pull the party into a dispute over readiness, chain of command, or blamed failure near Unity Square.
Vale Ledgermere will trade useful tactical knowledge if the party solves a security problem too sensitive for ordinary channels.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Weapon discipline, drilled stillness, and practiced readiness mark Vale Ledgermere as someone tied to organized force rather than casual violence.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Unity Square: drill yards, fortifications, command posts, or exposed routes

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Ward Mediator, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in The Union.
what_they_refuse: Vale Ledgermere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Ward Mediator too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Vale Ledgermere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Vale Ledgermere adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Vale Ledgermere is Known locally through day-to-day work as ward mediator. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Ward Mediator.
